mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stocks (item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, price, status) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{spaceId}, #{shelfId}, #{boxId}, #{lotId}, #{serialNumber}, #{lotNumber}, #{expirationDate}, #{memo}, #{price}, 'IN_STOCK')

INSERT INTO stocks (item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, price, status) VALUES
(#{s.itemId}, #{s.spaceId}, #{s.shelfId}, #{s.boxId}, #{s.lotId}, #{s.serialNumber}, #{s.lotNumber}, #{s.expirationDate}, #{s.memo}, #{s.price}, 'IN_STOCK')
mapper.select: SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE external_id = #{externalId}
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE box_id = #{boxId}

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND box_id IS NULL

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND shelf_id IS NULL
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND status = 'IN_STOCK'
SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE space_id = #{spaceId}

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND box_id = #{boxId} AND status = 'IN_STOCK' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND box_id IS NULL AND status = 'IN_STOCK' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND space_id = #{spaceId} AND shelf_id IS NULL AND status = 'IN_STOCK' ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND box_id = #{boxId} AND status = 'IN_STOCK' AND is_kept = FALSE ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND box_id IS NULL AND status = 'IN_STOCK' AND is_kept = FALSE ORDER BY created_at

SELECT id, external_id, item_id, space_id, shelf_id, box_id, lot_id, serial_number, lot_number, expiration_date, memo, status, is_kept, price, created_at FROM stocks WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND space_id = #{spaceId} AND shelf_id IS NULL AND status = 'IN_STOCK' AND is_kept = FALSE ORDER BY created_at
mapper.update:
UPDATE stocks SET space_id = #{spaceId}, shelf_id = #{shelfId}, box_id = #{boxId} WHERE status = 'IN_STOCK' AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sp.external_id AS space_external_id, sp.name AS space_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN spaces sp ON s.space_id = sp.id JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE i.external_id = #{itemExternalId} AND i.user_id = #{userId} AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY sp.id, sp.external_id, sp.name ORDER BY sp.name
mapper.sql: SELECT s.external_id, i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, sp.external_id AS space_external_id, sp.name AS space_name, sh.external_id AS shelf_external_id, sh.name AS shelf_name, b.external_id AS box_external_id, b.name AS box_name, il.external_id AS lot_external_id, s.serial_number, COALESCE(il.lot_number, s.lot_number) AS lot_number, s.expiration_date, s.memo, s.status, s.is_kept, s.price, i.price AS item_price, s.created_at FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id JOIN spaces sp ON s.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves sh ON s.shelf_id = sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes b ON s.box_id = b.id LEFT JOIN item_lots il ON s.lot_id = il.id
mapper.select: WHERE s.external_id = #{externalId} AND i.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.box_id = #{boxId} AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.box_id = #{boxId} AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name ORDER BY i.name ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.box_id = #{boxId} AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK'

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND s.box_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND s.box_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name ORDER BY i.name ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.shelf_id = #{shelfId} AND s.box_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK'

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.space_id = #{spaceId} AND s.shelf_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.space_id = #{spaceId} AND s.shelf_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK' GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name ORDER BY i.name ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.space_id = #{spaceId} AND s.shelf_id IS NULL AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK'

SELECT i.external_id AS item_external_id, i.name AS item_name, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS display_image_external_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.space_id = #{spaceId} AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK'
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY i.id, i.external_id, i.name ORDER BY
(SELECT MIN(st.created_at) FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks sk ON sk.id = st.stock_id WHERE sk.item_id = i.id AND sk.space_id = #{spaceId}) ASC NULLS LAST, i.name ASC
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks sk ON sk.id = st.stock_id WHERE sk.item_id = i.id AND sk.space_id = #{spaceId} AND st.transaction_type = 'IN') DESC, i.name ASC
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks sk ON sk.id = st.stock_id WHERE sk.item_id = i.id AND sk.space_id = #{spaceId} AND st.transaction_type = 'OUT') DESC, i.name ASC
(SELECT MAX(st.created_at) FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks sk ON sk.id = st.stock_id WHERE sk.item_id = i.id AND sk.space_id = #{spaceId}) DESC NULLS LAST, i.name ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM stocks s JOIN items i ON s.item_id = i.id WHERE s.space_id = #{spaceId} AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK'
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
